mapper.select: /* 요금제 약정기간 조회 : 해당정책코드에 해당하는 약정개월정보(무약정 포함) 리스트 조회 */ SELECT RA.SALE_PLCY_CD, RA.AGRM_TRM, RA.REGST_ID, RA.REGST_DTTM, RA.RVISN_ID, RA.RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_SALE_AGRM_MST RA WHERE RA.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} ORDER BY RA.AGRM_TRM

/* 할인유형조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT PL.SPRT_TP, --할인유형 (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID='F002' AND USE_YN='Y' AND PL.SPRT_TP=DTL_CD) AS SPRT_NM --할인유형명 FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST PL, MSP_SALE_ORGN_MST ORG, MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST PRDT WHERE PL.CNFM_YN='Y' -- 결제 YN (필수) AND PL.SALE_PLCY_CD = ORG.SALE_PLCY_CD AND PL.SALE_PLCY_CD = PRDT.SALE_PLCY_CD AND ORG.SALE_PLCY_cD = PRDT.SALE_PLCY_CD AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') BETWEEN PL.SALE_STRT_DTTM AND PL.SALE_END_DTTM --판매기간 (필수) AND PL.PLCY_TYPE_CD = #{plcyTypeCd} -- 온라인:O , 오프라인:M , 직영온라인 : D AND PL.PLCY_SCTN_CD = #{plcySctnCd} -- 01:단말,02:유심 AND ORG.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} -- 조직코드 AND PRDT.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} -- 단말기ID (자급제인 경우는 SKIP 처리) AND PL.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}
AND PL.PRDT_SCTN_CD = #{prdtSctnCd} -- LTE,3G

/* 핸드폰 색상 목록 조회 AppformMapper.selectPrdtColorList */ SELECT A.PRDT_COLR_CD AS MODEL_COLOR_CD ,B.CD_DSC AS MODEL_COLOR_NM ,PRDT_ID ,PRDT_NM FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.RPRS_YN = 'N' AND A.PRDT_COLR_CD = B.CD_VAL AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0044'

/* 휴대폰 용량 목록 조회 PhoneMapper.triggerSelectProdBasImgDtlList */ SELECT A.PROD_ID AS PRDT_ID ,A.ATRIB_VAL_CD_2 AS MODEL_CAPACITY_CD ,A.ATRIB_VAL_NM_2 AS MODEL_CAPACITY_NM FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP A , NMCP_PROD_ATRIB_VAL_DTL@DL_MCP B WHERE PROD_ID = #{prodId} AND A.ATRIB_VAL_CD_2 = A.ATRIB_VAL_CD_2 AND B.ATRIB_CD='P0' GROUP BY A.PROD_ID,A.ATRIB_VAL_CD_2,A.ATRIB_VAL_NM_2

/* 요금제 목록 조회 MspMapper.listRateByOrgnInfos */ SELECT DISTINCT RATE_MST.RATE_CD, RATE_MST.RATE_NM, RATE_MST.RATE_GRP_CD, RATE_MST.PAY_CL_CD, RATE_MST.RATE_TYPE, RATE_MST.DATA_TYPE, RATE_MST.BASE_AMT, RATE_MST.FREE_CALL_CL_CD, RATE_MST.FREE_CALL_CNT, RATE_MST.NW_IN_CALL_CNT, RATE_MST.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, RATE_MST.FREE_SMS_CNT, RATE_MST.FREE_DATA_CNT, RATE_MST.RMK, RATE_MST.ONLINE_TYPE_CD, RATE_MST.AL_FLAG, RATE_MST.CMNT, -- 요금제혜택 RATE_MST.SERVICE_TYPE, RATE_MST.JEHU_PROD_TYPE, --요금제제휴처 (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID='JehuProdType' AND DTL_CD=RATE_MST.JEHU_PROD_TYPE AND ROWNUM=1) AS JEHU_PROD_NM, -- 요금제 제휴처명 PLCY.SPRT_TP, PLCY.PLCY_SCTN_CD, --정책구분코드 01:단말, 02:USIM PLCY.PRDT_SCTN_CD, --제품구분코 02:3G, 03:LTE PLCY.PLCY_TYPE_CD --CMN0050 정책유형코드 : W 도매 FROM MSP_SALE_ORGN_MST ORGN, MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST PLCY, MSP_SALE_RATE_MST RATE, MSP_RATE_MST RATE_MST WHERE PLCY.CNFM_YN = 'Y' AND ORGN.SALE_PLCY_CD = PLCY.SALE_PLCY_CD AND PLCY.SALE_PLCY_CD = RATE.SALE_PLCY_CD AND RATE_MST.RATE_CD = RATE.RATE_CD AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') BETWEEN PLCY.SALE_STRT_DTTM AND PLCY.SALE_END_DTTM /* 판매기간 */ AND RATE_MST.PAY_CL_CD = #{payClCd} -- 후불 AND RATE_MST.SERVICE_TYPE = #{serviceType} -- 요금제유형 AND RATE_MST.RATE_CD IN ('PL241F504') -- 요금제코드
AND ORGN.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} /* 조직코드 */ AND PLCY.PLCY_SCTN_CD = #{plcySctnCd} /* 정책유형코드 */ AND ORGN.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} /* 판매정책코드 */ AND RATE_TYPE = #{rateType} /* 요금제유형 : 01(휴대폰), 02(유심) */ -- 02 아닌게 데이타가...흠
AND SPRT_TP = #{sprtTp} /* 할인유형 */
AND PLCY.PRDT_SCTN_CD = #{prdtSctnCd} -- 02:LTE, 03:3G
ORDER BY RATE_MST.RATE_NM

/* 공시지원금 조회 : MspMapper.listMspOfficialNoticeSupport */ SELECT DECODE(B.PRDT_IND_CD , '03', '3G' , '04', 'LTE', '45', '5G', '08', '5G') AS PRDT_IND_CD -- 단말구분 ,B.PRDT_NM -- 모델명 ,A.RATE_NM -- 요금제 ,D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC -- 출고가 ,C.SUBSD_AMT -- 공시지원금 ,CASE WHEN D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC - C.SUBSD_AMT< 0 THEN 0 ELSE D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC - C.SUBSD_AMT END AS PRIC_AMT -- 판매가 ,C.APPL_STRT_DT -- 공시일 FROM MSP_RATE_MST A ,CMN_INTM_MDL B ,( SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN, A.SUBSD_AMT, A.APPL_STRT_DT, A.APPL_END_DT FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST A WHERE to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT AND A.PRDT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT DTL_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID ='OFCLLIST' AND USE_YN ='Y' ) GROUP BY A.RATE_CD, A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN, A.SUBSD_AMT, A.APPL_STRT_DT, A.APPL_END_DT ) C , ( SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID, OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 AS OUT_UNIT_PRIC FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT A WHERE to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmddHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM ) D WHERE A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND B.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID AND C.PRDT_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND B.PRDT_DT > to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') AND A.RATE_CD NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9019' AND USG_YN = 'Y')
AND B.PRDT_IND_CD in ('45', '08')
AND B.PRDT_IND_CD = #{prdtIndCd} -- 단말유형 : LTE, 3G
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '3G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'LTE'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '5G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = DECODE(B.PRDT_IND_CD,'45', '5G', '08', '5G')
AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} -- 요금제 AND D.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} -- 핸드폰 대표단말코드 ORDER BY B.PRDT_IND_CD DESC , B.PRDT_NM, A.RATE_NM

/** 부가서비스 상세 정보 조회 **/ SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.RATE_NM, A.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A LEFT JOIN MSP_SALE_RATE_MST B ON A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND B.SALE_PLCY_CD IS NULL AND A.RATE_CD IN
#{addRate.prodId}
